svg.title: Storyboarding and visual planning stage
svg.desc: Three-part diagram. Top shows inputs: annotated script and animation template library feeding in. Middle shows four storyboarding tasks: metaphor selection, template matching, style enforcement, and complexity gating. A human review checkpoint sits between the middle and bottom. Bottom shows output: per-scene visual specs passed to Manim code generation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the annotated script that enters storyboarding?')
sendPrompt('What does the animation template library contain?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM select visual metaphors for abstract concepts?')
sendPrompt('How does template matching work — what templates exist?')
sendPrompt('What are the 3Blue1Brown style rules this stage enforces?')
sendPrompt('What is complexity gating and why is it needed?')

svg.text: Approve · edit · reject scenes before codegen

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does a per-scene visual specification contain?')
sendPrompt('How are narration timings linked to animation keyframes?')
sendPrompt('What style tokens are carried through to Manim code generation?')
sendPrompt('How does Manim code generation use the visual specs?')
